name: Traditional Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the pastry shell. Mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
4. Bake at 425 degrees for 15 minutes.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 35 to 40 minutes, or until the center is set.
6. Cool before garnishing as desired. Refrigerate leftovers.
